description: Brand-NEUTRAL default visual-check question pack (release-spec §10.3 'visual-check default question pack'; §1 tree 'question packs live in rules/, not code'). Ships zero brand specifics: operators copy this to $CONTENT_HOME/brands/<brand>/visual-pack.json and replace the questions/pass logic with their own brand-fidelity checks. The engine (engine/gate/visual-check/) authors no brand content; it consumes a pack as data. Pass logic is declarative (no code): all_false/all_true booleans, no_embedded_text, and an optional require_identity gate.

questions.prompt: boolean — true if the main subject of the image matches the subject the brief describes
boolean — true if the image looks like generic AI/stock filler with no brand identity cues
boolean — true if the image carries an unmistakable brand identity cue (logo, mascot, owned art style, named character) per the brief
boolean — true if foreground humans appear that the brief did not call for
boolean — true if the brief used a control (no/avoid/without/plain/unmarked/exactly one) and the image visibly violates it
string — list any readable text, dates, logos, signage, or pseudo-glyph markings baked into the frame, or "none"
string — one-sentence neutral description of the main subject
